feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What if you take Elite dangerous but set in 1700s age of sail instead Why wouldn…
entry.content: What if you take Elite dangerous but set in 1700s age of sail instead Why wouldn't it work?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >bro try this DISTRO its PERFECT for gaming >bro try THIS if you want to retain …
entry.content: >bro try this DISTRO its PERFECT for gaming >bro try THIS if you want to retain that windows feel and avoid the terminal and DO GAMING >bro this distro is 99% based on this other popular distro but it has been TWEAKED FOR GAMING >bro try STEAMOS for an EASY GAMING FOCUSED desktop experience Linux popularity is going, but at what cost?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >be me >playing against the storm >ashen thicket biome >have beavers and frogs >…
entry.content: >be me >playing against the storm >ashen thicket biome >have beavers and frogs >first blueprint is for a plantation, my favorite type of farm building >second is for a cellar, which takes berries to make wine and pickled goods >find a 15 plot farmland immediately and toss plantatioms on there >mfw I'm gonna make wine my friggen frogs and beavers are gonna be so happy bros

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Reminder: The country with the biggest Odyssey viewership is India. All rating a…
entry.content: Reminder: The country with the biggest Odyssey viewership is India. All rating and review sites are getting spammed by Indians giving it 5 stars. entry.title: /g/ Technology: If 1m context length is supposed to be 3000 pages of text literally more than tw…
entry.content: If 1m context length is supposed to be 3000 pages of text literally more than twice the bible then wtf is going on behind the scenes with Anthropic's models for them to constantly have to compact sessions as the 1m context length is reached? I asked Fable 1 thing (in chat mode, where you're able to see all the thinking between the lines) and after 30 minutes or so it had to compact the conversation, I gave it 1 prompt, and I'm pretty sure it did not type several fucking novels
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: Pelé played Plumberball "That last brazilian goal in 1970 "wouldn't have happene…
entry.content: Pelé played Plumberball "That last brazilian goal in 1970 "wouldn't have happened today," explains Professor Orlando Laitano of the University of Florida in the United States. He is one of the leading experts in exercise physiology. If that Brazilian team could travel through time, their play would probably be intercepted by modern opponents. And "the biggest imbalance wouldn't be talent, but physiology," according to Laitano."
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: What would happen if we threw 1000 mexicans with a bunch of modern books and ass…
entry.content: What would happen if we threw 1000 mexicans with a bunch of modern books and assault rifles into the coast of abbasid spain? Would they starve? Use their future technology as leverage? Would the muslims believe that they come from the future, or just from across the Atlantic? Would that make medieval people think the new world is some hyperborean super-society? What about their Christianity? What would happen if these mexicans are not taken at their word by medieval people but instead believed t
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I hate full fledged auto battle modes in grindy games because it means that thos…
entry.content: I hate full fledged auto battle modes in grindy games because it means that those games are now designed around having to use it and turning your pc/console into a pseudo bitcoin miner that runs overnight if grinds are intended to be afk farmed then there should just be a way to instantly clear the fight or multiply the loot you get per fight by either using a limited resource or making the fight exponentially harder earlier disgaea games are a perfect example of grindy games that actually respe
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Are prisons in your cunt massive aquariums full of unwashed BBCs swimming around…
entry.content: Are prisons in your cunt massive aquariums full of unwashed BBCs swimming around like bloodthirsty sharks waiting for the next latinx/timmy to be dropped and rapaciously violated? Are law enforcement officers in your cunt overzealous and see penal codes (Lol) as divine texts? How seriously do law enforcement officers take their authority to detain citizens, hoist them onto cranes and dangle them over the BBC aquariums and relish as all the BBCs leap out to try and grab the arrestee and drag them
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I've always been a big fan of ublock, but today I disabled it to test something,…
entry.content: I've always been a big fan of ublock, but today I disabled it to test something, and holy shit, Firefox is so much faster without it. I feel very conflicted right now and I'm not sure what to do anymore. It's so useful, even if just for manually blocking things, but I never realized how sluggish it makes the browser.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: What killed Lulz.net?
entry.content: What happened to Lulz.net? Was surprised recently to find it appears to be permanently offline with no IRC, Discord, or Twitter presence either. Just a 20 year old website that just got unplugged one day, for seemingly no reason?
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Why do songs rhyme?
entry.content: How did we as a species almost unanimously come to the agreement that similar sounding words put next to each other sounds good in music?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: need a second commuterslop car
entry.content: So I bought a C6 partially because of /o/'s recommendation. It's great, and I love driving it. However, I just got a job that's 50ish miles from my house and I have to commute every day. I don't think spending $20 on gas and driving 100 miles on my Corvette is very practical, so I'm looking at getting a beater that gets decent gas mileage, and that I won't feel bad driving into the ground. Wondering if anyone on the board has recommendations. My budget is around $3,000, I'd be willing to go up t
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I went to jail for two days. The worst part was that it was so fucking boring, a…
entry.content: I went to jail for two days. The worst part was that it was so fucking boring, and I had no internet. But this drug dealer, this meth guy, and this guy in for domestic battery were lowkey pretty chill. All of the food sucked, except for this one meal where they had this hot dog with chili sauce on it.
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Ocarina of Time Remake
entry.content: So I know some if not most of you fags are gonna hate it. Hell most of you already hate it. But for those who don’t, what would you like to see out of it? Personally I would like: >A much larger Hyrule field with shit actually in it. >Castle town should also be expanded with more to do. >More enemy variety. >More dungeons. >Decent camera. >Navi settings to make it stop handholding you. >horseback combat felt added it at the last second, so definitely more with it. Anything else you would like to
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: OK, tried my best and I've run into enough walls that I have to ask. Playing La …
entry.content: OK, tried my best and I've run into enough walls that I have to ask. Playing La Mulana for the first time, getting frustrated often but overall fun game. However, there is an issue with this room. I know this is where I activate the area boss fight, I saw the ankh showing up, but decided to leave it for later because I wanted to beat the first area boss (which I had missed previously, my first boss was the mine cart chase) So I get that done, and now I want to beat the waterfall area boss, I ret
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Dr. Doom is the main character in the next Avenger's movie. Bold move, but I'm …
entry.content: >Dr. Doom is the main character in the next Avenger's movie. Bold move, but I'm not sure how that's gonna work. Are we supposed to root for the guy? Is the movie about his downfall? People who've read the comics probably have an idea of how the movie will play out.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /o/ Auto: My grandma gave me her old Prius when she moved into a retirement home and didn’…
entry.content: My grandma gave me her old Prius when she moved into a retirement home and didn’t need it anymore. Is it true most people think I’m lame for driving a Prius? Is it a “gay” car?

entry.title: /int/ International: I'm scared of going to Italy
entry.content: Bros I'm flying to Italy next month and I was checking the streets near my hotel on Google maps, and it looked like a fucking shithole? There were like 30 guys hanging around in a corner doing nothing at all, just hanging out on both sides of the street, and most of them were dressed like pakis! What the fuck is going on in Italy? Is the entire country like this now? I thought it was a meme? Google told me the place was only like 10% muslim but on google maps like 50% of people in the street loo
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: ADL
entry.content: Is the ADL actually on our side or just taking advantage to sow racial divisions for their plot? They appear to be somewhat open to understanding ongoing trends opening up to the real world. They could either have actively censored or at least attempted to say "hey, this is bad" but every one of their pages just openly shares outstanding examples of memes. It's actively sharing shit to the real world and gen z, and now alpha, chuds just eat it up. How are they honestly expecting the world to rea
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

You see, I always sleep with a hatchet at my side. I'm thinking that I won't go and confront him with my bare fist, but rather with the hatchet It doesn't matter if it's jus
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Which is the better band: Foreigner, Bad Company, King Crimson, or Sabaton?
entry.content: I say Sabaton. With its thundering riffs that march through history, its choruses with powerful synths, it is one of the greatest bands of all time. Neither Foreigner nor Bad company could be this, they are music for dads to listen to while drinking a beer after working. Lazy music for lazy limp wrist men who do not wish to drive a panzer and conquer empires. And King Crimson is mere noise, there are not even attempts at riffs. What are your opinions?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: /security and privacy/
entry.content: I use QubesOS with detached boot partition on 2 duplicated USB drives with any data that rests on the SSD/HDDs being encrypted with LUKS2. Whonix gateway is proxied through a VPN qube to hide Tor IPs (can't hide communication patterns) without bridges since bridge IPs can be farmed. Sometimes Tor through I2P outproxy or vice-versa or with different anonymizing network overlays. Clients used for browsing are only opened in on-RAM ephemeral qubes with no access to permanent storage. Attack surface
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What is the future for TVs?
entry.content: Literally every Japanese brand is dead and belongs to the Chinese >Sharp is Foxconn >Sony sold 51% of its Bravia TVs to TCL >Panasonic is doing the same with Skyworth >Toshiba is just a name used by Hisense That means only LG and Samsung manufacture their own TV's (and they're south korean)
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: does /g/ employ crack head technology
entry.content: my room was getting very warm and i did not want to pay more for electricity (a/c is overkill). so i thought for a bit and had an epiphany: the mail trucks used by USPS have a 6-inch dashboard fan. they do not work for postal workers in extreme heat outside, but might help me indoors. so i have purchased one of the same size and specs (runs on AC though, mail trucks use DC). and it is very effective. noisy? a bit, but it drowns out the far more annoying amazon 767s over my house. idk
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: What is the best two car garage that includes a daily driver and a utility vehic…
entry.content: What is the best two car garage that includes a daily driver and a utility vehicle, with only a 30k budget. Do you spend more on the car since it's where you'll be most days and a cheap pick up? Or do you spend more on the truck since cheap trucks are likely to be dogged out. Maybe spend it all on the best half ton around? Or get a Maverick to split the difference? Or even substitute the truck for a more affordable SUV and a utility trailer? Is there even a right answer?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.content: Gyaru Edition This thread is for anons that are into straight blacked/interracial content involving their waifus, without the extreme and political content of the main blacked thread. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Our Second World War...is ending
entry.content: >Our Second World War...is ending

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >God, why have you forsaken me? But Jesus IS God, so why is God asking himself w…
entry.content: >God, why have you forsaken me? But Jesus IS God, so why is God asking himself why he has forsaken... himself? Did no one seriously catch this plothole before it made it to the screen?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
